statusLine.command: input=$(cat); current_dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir // .cwd'); total_input=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); remaining_pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); session_name="${CLAUDE_SESSION_NAME:-$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_name // empty')}"; session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id // empty'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '(.model.id // .model) // empty'); effort=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.thinking_effort // empty'); git_branch=$(cd "$current_dir" 2>/dev/null && git -c core.fileMode=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$git_branch" ] && [ -d "$current_dir/.git" ] && git_branch="(detached)"; total_tokens=$((total_input + total_output)); input_cost=$(echo "scale=4; $total_input * 3 / 1000000" | bc); output_cost=$(echo "scale=4; $total_output * 15 / 1000000" | bc); total_cost=$(echo "scale=4; $input_cost + $output_cost" | bc); dir_name=$(basename "$current_dir"); output="$(printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m' "$dir_name")"; [ -n "$git_branch" ] && output="${output} $(printf '\033[32m(%s)\033[0m' "$git_branch")"; if [ -n "$session_name" ]; then output="${output} $(printf '\033[95m[%s]\033[0m' "$session_name")"; elif [ -n "$session_id" ]; then output="${output} $(printf '\033[95m[%s]\033[0m' "${session_id:0:8}")"; fi; [ -n "$model" ] && output="${output} $(printf '\033[96m%s\033[0m' "$model")"; [ -n "$effort" ] && output="${output} $(printf '\033[93m%s\033[0m' "$effort")"; [ "$total_tokens" -gt 0 ] && output="${output} $(printf '\033[33m%dK tokens\033[0m' $((total_tokens / 1000)))"; [ -n "$remaining_pct" ] && output="${output} $(printf '\033[34m%s%% ctx\033[0m' "$remaining_pct")"; (( $(echo "$total_cost > 0" | bc -l) )) && output="${output} $(printf '\033[35m$%s\033[0m' "$total_cost")"; echo "$output"
